headline: Rate Cuts Are Coming: Here’s How to Position TLT, XLRE, and ITB Now
summary: The Federal Reserve has already trimmed its policy rate by 0.75 percentage points over the past year, leaving the upper bound at 3.75%. The question facing rate-sensitive sectors is what happens if the cutting cycle continues. Three exchange-traded funds sit at the center of that question: the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (NASDAQ:TLT), the ... Rate Cuts Are Coming: Here’s How to Position TLT, XLRE, and ITB Now

headline: Millrose Properties Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: MIAMI, May 06, 2026--Millrose Properties, Inc. (NYSE: MRP, "Millrose" or the "Company"), the homesite option platform for residential homebuilders, today announced its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Lennar (LEN) After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Lennar's current share price offers value or just reflects sentiment, the recent performance gives you a useful starting point. The stock closed at US$86.20, with returns of a 6.6% decline over 7 days, a 0.3% decline over 30 days, a 17.3% decline year to date and a 17.3% decline over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns are 14.6% and 2.7% declines respectively. These moves have kept Lennar on many investors' watchlists, as they reassess how the current...
